case_title: OSCAR HERRERA CONTRERAS VS. NERY GOMEZ

PLAINTIFF OSCAR HERRERA CONTRERAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NERY GOMEZ DBA AS EXCELSIOR AUTO REPAIR IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, NERY DBA EXCELSIOR AUTO REPAIR HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HERRERA CONTRERAS, OSCAR GOMEZ, NERY DBA EXCELSIOR AUTO REPAIR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S MOTION TO NOV-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OSCAR HERRERA CONTRERAS IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS DORA GARCIA. DEFENDANT NERY GOMEZ (DBA EXCELSIOR AUTO REPAIR) IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER RUTH FLORENCE MACKAY (#301444). BEFORE THE NEXT COURT DATE, PLAINTIFF IS TO GO TO THE DMV TO RENEW, OBTAIN PLATES, AND DETERMINE IF PLAINTIFF MUST PAY ANY PARKING TICKETS OR NOT. IF PLAINTIFF HAS TO PAY ANY PARKING TICKETS, PLAINTIFF MAY BRING EVIDENCE OF THOSE PAYMENTS TO THE NEXT COURT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF OBTAINS PLATES, PLAINTIFF MAY GO TO DEFENDANT'S SHOP TO PICK UP PLAINTIFF'S VAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA CONTRERAS, OSCAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, NERY DBA EXCELSIOR AUTO REPAIR $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,115.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF TO COVER HIS DAMAGES RELATED TO HIS CAR BEING REPAIRED IMPROPERLY AND ALLOWING A THIRD-PARTY TO TAKE THE CAR OFF PREMISES AND GETTING NUMEROUS PARKING TICKETS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
